tasks.title: Run CI jobs only for relevant change contexts
tasks.goal: Reduce PR and deploy feedback time by skipping unrelated jobs.
scope: Detect changed paths in GitHub Actions.
Run web lint, tests, build, and E2E only for web-affecting changes.
Run Go API and MCP tests only for backend-affecting changes.
Run Terraform validation and plan only for infrastructure changes.
Run lightweight checks for documentation-only changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Docs-only PRs do not run full web, API, E2E, or Terraform jobs.
Web-only PRs run web jobs and skip Go/Terraform unless shared files changed.
Infra-only PRs run Terraform jobs and skip app E2E.
Shared files trigger all impacted jobs.
Workflow summaries state which jobs were skipped and why.
tests: Unit or shell tests for path classification if extracted.
Manual workflow dispatch validation.
PR validation with docs-only, web-only, API-only, and infra-only changes.

tasks.title: Render API-published blog posts in SEO-visible server paths
tasks.goal: Make admin-published posts visible to users, Google, crawlers, RSS, sitemap, and LLM assets.
scope: Move public blog list and detail loading toward server-side data fetching.
Expose a stable helper for server-side post reads.
Update sitemap.xml to include DB-published posts.
Update rss.xml to include DB-published posts.
Update llms.txt and ai-context.json to include DB-published posts.
Generate metadata, canonical URLs, and Open Graph tags for DB-published posts.
acceptanceCriteria: A post published from admin appears in rendered HTML for /blog.
A post published from admin has a crawlable /blog/{slug} page.
Published posts appear in sitemap.xml and rss.xml.
Published posts appear in llms.txt and ai-context.json.
Static fallback still works if API is unavailable during local development.
tests: Unit tests for API-to-SEO post mapping.
API integration tests for published post fields needed by SEO.
Playwright E2E checking rendered HTML contains an API-published post.
Playwright or API checks for sitemap, RSS, llms.txt, and ai-context.json.

tasks.title: Enable public comment submission with Turnstile protection
tasks.goal: Allow readers to submit comments safely while keeping moderation mandatory.
scope: Build the public comment form below blog posts.
Integrate the Cloudflare Turnstile widget and client token.
Submit comments to the existing backend endpoint.
Show pending moderation confirmation.
Keep approved-only comments visible publicly.
Handle honeypot spam rejection, validation errors, and rate limits.
acceptanceCriteria: Readers can submit valid comments and receive a pending moderation message.
Invalid or empty comments show clear validation feedback.
Submitted comments are not public until approved.
Admin can approve comments and they appear publicly.
Honeypot submissions are rejected.
tests: Unit tests for comment form validation and payload mapping.
API integration tests for pending comment creation.
Playwright E2E for submit to pending message.
Playwright E2E for admin approve to public visibility.

tasks.title: Improve admin account operations
tasks.goal: Make admin access manageable without manual database edits.
scope: Add a logout button to the admin shell.
Add a change password page and form.
Add a backend endpoint for password changes.
Add a safe admin password reset script for VM operations.
Invalidate or clearly handle existing sessions after password changes.
Document the admin account recovery flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can log out from the UI.
Admin can change password after entering the current password.
Old password no longer works after a password change.
Existing sessions are revoked or clearly handled.
Reset script updates the password safely with a backup warning.
tests: Unit tests for password payload validation.
API tests for password change success and failure.
Playwright E2E for logout.
Playwright E2E for the change password flow.

tasks.title: Implement admin media library
tasks.goal: Allow images and assets to be uploaded and reused in posts or projects.
scope: Implement a media upload endpoint or wire the existing media model.
Store media metadata in the database.
Store files in configured storage or a VM volume as the first phase.
Build /admin/media list, upload, and delete UI.
Allow selecting media in the post editor.
Add alt text editing.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can upload an image.
Uploaded image appears in the media list.
Admin can set and edit alt text.
Admin can insert or reference an image in a post.
Deleted media is no longer selectable.
tests: Unit tests for media form validation.
API integration tests for upload, list, and delete metadata.
Playwright E2E for upload, list, and select.
Accessibility checks for required alt text.

tasks.title: Implement admin projects CRUD
tasks.goal: Manage portfolio projects from admin instead of static site data.
scope: Add or wire project database queries and endpoints.
Build admin project list, create, edit, and archive UI.
Render public projects from API/DB with static fallback.
Update SEO and GEO assets to include DB projects.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can create a project.
Admin can edit project content, stack, and signals.
Published projects appear on /projects and /projects/{slug}.
Archived projects are hidden publicly.
Sitemap and AI context include published projects.
tests: Unit tests for project payload mapping.
API integration tests for project CRUD.
Playwright E2E for create, edit, and archive project.
Public E2E for project visibility.

tasks.title: Run real staging admin E2E after deploy
tasks.goal: Verify deployed staging with the real API, database, Caddy, cookies, and IAP tunnel.
scope: Add a staging-only Playwright suite using the deployed staging URL or IAP tunnel.
Login with staging admin credentials from GitHub environment secrets.
Create a unique test post.
Publish the test post.
Verify it appears publicly.
Create or seed a comment and moderate it.
Clean up test content after the run.
acceptanceCriteria: Deploy workflow validates real staging login.
Deploy workflow validates the real post publish path.
Deploy workflow validates real public blog visibility.
Deploy workflow validates real comment moderation.
Test data is uniquely named and cleaned up or archived.
tests: Playwright staging E2E with the real backend.
Cleanup verification step.
Failure artifact upload with traces and screenshots.

tasks.title: Deploy container images through Artifact Registry
tasks.goal: Replace slow and fragile IAP/SCP image archive transfers with registry-backed image delivery.
scope: Create or configure a Google Artifact Registry Docker repository.
Build web, API, and MCP images with immutable tags based on the Git commit SHA.
Push release images from GitHub Actions to Artifact Registry.
Update VM deploy flow to pull the requested image tags instead of copying a compressed docker save archive over IAP/SFTP.
Keep IAP SSH for executing the remote deploy script, but remove large image transfer from the SSH tunnel.
Add rollback documentation using previously published image tags.
acceptanceCriteria: Deploy workflows no longer transfer large docker image archives over gcloud compute scp.
VM pulls images from Artifact Registry using the VM service account.
Each deployed container image has an immutable commit SHA tag and revision label.
Deploy logs show image tags and digests used for each service.
A failed deploy can be retried without rebuilding images when the tags already exist.
tests: Workflow dry run or staging deploy proving images are pushed and pulled from Artifact Registry.
IAM validation for GitHub push permissions and VM pull permissions.
Deployment script validation for image tag inputs.
Staging rollback test using a previous image tag.
